channel.title: Operating System on pnijhara's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Operating System on pnijhara's blog

item.title: Prajjwal Learns CS (Operating System) - 02
item.description: The day was good. Did some productive tasks. Managed to focus, follow and write notes. What did I do/learn today? Went into the depth of types of OS and how OS evolved with time. What is a process Memory blocks Process control blocks Process control blocks in my opinion is not that simple topic. I have to give more time to such topics. Real-time operating systems (RTOS) and Embedded OS, attracted me a lot.

item.title: Prajjwal Learns CS (Operating System)
item.description: More than Computer Science itself, I am beginning a new phase of my journey, where now I will not write much code. However, it is all intended towards the theoretical aspect of the things I used to love. I am committing 5 to 6 hours a day on weekdays and a tiny to the blogs. The rest of the time will go to my major degree (Electrical Engineering). Many asked me why I am learning CS along with Electrical.
